titleStmt.title: SII 8.330: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 330. (A.R. No. 55 of 1903). ON A PILLAR IN THE WESTERN SIDE OF THE VERANDAH CLOSE TO THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
A portion of the inscription at the beginning is lost.puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi minavar
nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉaimannavar Eriyaluṟ ṟu
ḻitara tikkaṉaittun taṉ cakkara naṭātti virasiṁhāsana ttu U
lakuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirā jakecaripa
nma rāka tribhuvana ccakra vattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻade vaṟ
ku yāṇṭu nāṟpattāṟāvatu coḻamaṇṭilattu rā janā
rāyaṇavaḷanāṭṭu viḷaināṭṭu Araicūr śivabrā
hma ṇaṉ pālāṣriyaṉ cāttaṉ civappiriyaṉāna koḻam
paṉāyakaṉ kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tirumuṉai
ppāṭi kiḻamūrṉāṭṭu Ātirācamaṅkaliyapurattu Uṭai
yār tiruviraṭṭānamuṭaiyār tiruppaṅkuni Uttira
t tirunāḷil Uṭaiyār tiricciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār tiruve
ḻiccikku perun=ti ruvamutukku cennalarici patiṉkalattukku Iraṇ
ṭañcākki nellu Irupattaiṅkalamum palavaṟkattuk kaṟiya
mutu muvāyirap palattukku nellu mukkalamum neyyamutu kuṟu
ṇikku mukkalamum miḷakamutu nāṉāḻikku nellu ṉāṟ
kalamum tayiramutu kalattukku nelluk kalamum caṟkaraiyamutu
niṟai nālukku nellu ṉāṟkalamum Uppamutu tūṇikku ne
lluk kalamum puḷiyamutu niṟai Oṉṟukku nelluk kalamum
Aṭaikkāyamutukkup pākku Āyirattukkum veṟṟilaip
paṟṟu Aimpatukkum tiramam Iraṇṭukku nellu Aṟukala
mum cāttiaruḷac cāntukkum kaṟpūrattukkum kācu Oṉṟukku
nellu Irupatiṉkalamum ceṅkaḻunīr tiruppaḷḷittāmam Iraṇ
ṭāyiraṅ koḷḷak kācu Araikku nellu(p) patiṉkalamum citāri
kku nellu Irukalamum vaḻakkattukkup palavaṟkattup paricaṭṭa
Uru Eṇpatukku kācu Añcukku nellu nūṟṟukkalamum dā nampaṇṇiya
ruḷa poṉ Araikkaḻañcukku nellu Irupatiṉ kalamum tirukkāppuṉāṇu
kkup poṉ Araikkālukku nellu Irukalane tūṇip patakkum Aṭik
ki ḻaṭṭa Arici patakkukku nellu Aiṅkuṟuṇiyum Āka I 2 100 2� Innel
lu Irunūṟṟu Irukalane Irutūṇikkum kollainilattuk kāṇiyākak koṇṭu
tirutti viṭṭa nilamāvatu Uṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭānamuṭaiyār tevatānamāna
koḻuntāḻvāreri karaikku kiḻakkum tiruviraṭṭānamuṭaiyāṉ vāykkālukku
vaṭakkum kuppaieṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku meṟkum cattiyapāvai
Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukkum tiruviti tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ
enṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Oruveli Inni
lam Oru veliyum Ittiruveḻiccit tiruppaṭi cantrā tittavaṟ cella
kkaṭavitākap paṇṇināṉ Aracūruṭaiyāṉ cāttaṉ civappiriyaṉāṉa koḻampa
nāyakaṉ . Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 8.330 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
